art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 public days underway (Mar 27-29); strong sales reported by major galleries despite wider market volatility.
top_stories: Fair features 240 galleries; debut of 'Echoes' sector and Asia debut of 'Zero 10' digital initiative.
Global galleries report consistent high-value sales; strong museum and private collection interest in Korean artists.
New 5-year collaboration with Hong Kong Culture Bureau reinforces city's role as premier arts trading hub.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI volatile; closed trading week down but pared early 3% losses. Markets reacted to Google's 'TurboQuant' AI tech and ongoing Iran conflict tensions.
key_factors: Google's 'TurboQuant' algorithm impacts semi stocks; Samsung and SK Hynix faced downward pressure.
Middle East tensions boost oil prices (Brent ~$108/bbl), dampening general investor sentiment.
Retail investors active in bargain-hunting helped KOSPI recover toward afternoon close.
